outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump says ceasefire with Iran on 'massive life support' after he rejects Tehran's proposal
outlets.summary: CNN liveblog covers Trump calling Iran's counter-proposal 'a piece of garbage' and declaring ceasefire on 'massive life support.' Reports some Trump aides are now more seriously considering resumption of major combat operations.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'life support,' calls latest proposal 'garbage'
outlets.summary: WaPo reports Trump calling Iran's proposal 'the weakest right now' and saying he 'didn't even finish reading it.' New US sanctions on 12 entities facilitating Iranian oil sales to China announced the same day, days before Trump-Xi summit.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Trump rejects Iran's latest response to U.S. ceasefire proposal
outlets.summary: NPR covers Iran's counter-proposal: uranium transfer to third country with return clause, deferred nuclear talks, compensation demands. US rejected as 'totally unacceptable.' Iran vows it will 'never bow' in formal response.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump: Iran Ceasefire 'on Life Support' After 'Garbage' Reply — Weighs Renewed Operations
outlets.summary: Right-leaning coverage frames Trump's rejection as strength. Highlights Trump meeting with military advisers and evaluating renewed operations. Trump told Fox News that Iranian hardliners 'are going to fold,' and that US Ambassador Waltz laid out 'very clear red lines' on nuclear weapons.

outlets.name: Newsmax
outlets.headline: Netanyahu: Iran War 'Not Over,' Nuclear Sites Need Dismantled
outlets.summary: Newsmax emphasizes Netanyahu's hawkish position: war 'not over' until enriched uranium removed and sites dismantled. Frames Iran deal as critical national security imperative. Netanyahu's 60 Minutes appearance seen as coordinated message with Trump's rejection.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran says US making 'unreasonable' demands in negotiations to end war
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera reports Iran's FM spokesman Baghaei calls US demands 'unreasonable' and 'one-sided.' Iran's proposal included Hormuz sovereignty, war compensation, deferred nuclear talks — all rejected by Trump as 'totally unacceptable.' Qatar PM accused of 'weaponizing' Hormuz.

outlets.name: CNBC
outlets.headline: Iran says it will 'never bow' as Trump rejects peace counteroffer, prolonging Middle East conflict
outlets.summary: CNBC analysis: deadlock explained. Iran proposed 5-yr moratorium on enrichment, US demanded 20. Iran offered to transfer enriched uranium to third country with return clause if US exits deal. US demands Iran surrender all ~440kg HEU and immediately halt enrichment.

outlets.name: Bloomberg
outlets.headline: Iran War Ceasefire Fragile as US Rejects Tehran's Latest Offer
outlets.summary: Bloomberg covers fragile ceasefire as Trump-Xi summit begins in Beijing. Oil up 3% after rejection. US sanctioned 12 entities for Iranian oil sales to China. China told domestic firms to ignore sanctions on refiners, while also tightening financial access for Iran ahead of summit.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Iran's resilience drowns Israel in a war of attrition in Lebanon
outlets.summary: Haaretz analysis: Iran's resilience is dragging Israel into a war of attrition on the Lebanese front with no 'clear picture of victory.' Netanyahu's 60 Minutes appearance signals indefinite Hezbollah fighting. Live updates: US ceasefire on 'life support,' oil markets roiled.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF intercepts apparent Houthi drone near Eilat in first attack on city since Iran ceasefire
outlets.summary: ToI liveblog Day 74: Houthi drone intercepted near Eilat — first attack on the city since ceasefire. Netanyahu says Iran war 'not over' and insists war with Hezbollah is 'separate.' US ceasefire described as on 'life support' after Iran's proposal rejected.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Netanyahu says Iran regime change 'possible, not guaranteed'
outlets.summary: Iran International reports Netanyahu's 60 Minutes interview claiming regime change is 'possible.' Notes this is a significant shift in Israeli public messaging — previously Netanyahu focused on nuclear program, not regime change. Analysis of impact on negotiations.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran says its proposal was generous as US insists on 'unreasonable demands'
outlets.summary: Press TV frames Iran's counter-proposal as 'reasonable and generous.' Baghaei: US demands are 'unreasonable' and 'one-sided.' Iran demands end to war, lifting blockade, releasing frozen assets, and ensuring security in Lebanon and the region before nuclear talks.

outlets.name: IRNA (Iran State Media)
outlets.headline: Iran's response in line with previous positions; ceasefire in exchange for reciprocal Hormuz opening
outlets.summary: IRNA presents Iran's counter-proposal as consistent and principled: readiness to continue ceasefire in exchange for Hormuz reciprocal opening and advancing negotiations to end war. Frames Trump's rejection as evidence of US bad faith.
